rationale: The cited paper is used in the citing paper's core theoretical positioning, not just a bibliography list. Zhu and Dukes cite Gal-Or, Geylani, and Yildirim (2012) when describing prior media-bias models and when contrasting their own assumptions, especially around advertiser-driven bias and limited consumer inference in prior work. This citation helps define the gap their model addresses (selective factual reporting with consumer anticipation), even though they do not directly reuse the cited model's specific mechanism.
relation_description: The citing paper uses the cited paper as a key reference point in the prior media-bias literature and positions its contribution in contrast to that stream. It differentiates itself by focusing on selective factual-content reporting and consumer inference rather than advertiser-side bias mechanisms.
